# opt — Coregx

> Optional types for Go. Generic-first SQL+JSON nullable types with three-state PATCH support.

## Docs

- [API Reference](https://pkg.go.dev/github.com/coregx/opt)
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/coregx/opt/blob/main/AGENTS.md): AI agent instructions

## Organization

- [Coregx](https://github.com/coregx)
